name: Ghola gro-Muzgol
bio:
Physical Appearance: Orsimer (Orc) male vampire with the physical traits associated with vampirism.

Race: Orsimer

Personality Keywords: devoted, corrupted

Role: Vampire and former worshipper of Azura; member of the Afflicted Brethren in Gutted Mine.

Home Location Information: Resides within Gutted Mine alongside the other members of the Afflicted Brethren.

Equipment and Abilities: Engages primarily in direct physical combat consistent with warrior training. Displays heightened aggression and the supernatural strength typical of vampires.

Personality – Afflicted Worshipper: Ghola gro-Muzgol was once a follower of Azura and became afflicted with vampirism after taking part in the slaying of a powerful vampire named Dratik. He remains within Gutted Mine with the other Afflicted Brethren, bound together by their shared origin and condition. One of the group carries a worn, faded note that records the identities of the Brethren.

Fate: Ghola gro-Muzgol is one of the Afflicted Brethren whom Azura seeks to have released from their curse during her intervention at Gutted Mine.
author: Bethesda
